packet.intent: Bounded production recommendations for route pacing, hazard readability, secrets, encounter density, route labels, and performance/readability risk.

recommendations.risk: Players may miss or misread the bypass as incidental side dressing, reducing route-expansion value.
recommendations.recommendation: Batch entrance, midpoint, and rejoin labeling so the bypass reads as a coherent alternate pressure route.
expected_implementation_touchpoints: Level02 route signage prefabs or scene label objects
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Start at bypass entrance, navigate to midpoint, identify rejoin label, complete route without relying on minimap/debug camera. Capture entrance/midpoint/rejoin screenshots.

recommendations.risk: Pressure hazards can feel unfair if damage occurs before players learn the vent cycle and safe state.
recommendations.recommendation: Re-time pressure vent hazards into teach, execute, and combine beats with visible safe pockets.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Walk and sprint the bypass route at normal camera height; verify no blind damage while rounding corners and that each vent has an observable idle/safe state.

recommendations.risk: Secrets may become random wall-hug rewards instead of reinforcing pressure-system mastery.
recommendations.recommendation: Place one optional secret behind a readable pressure-system choice after the player has learned at least two hazard tells.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Complete bypass without secret, then complete secret branch and return; confirm route completion does not require discovering the secret.

recommendations.risk: Height changes can obscure progression, optional branches, and safe return paths.
recommendations.recommendation: Batch label, sightline, and collision cleanup for all gantry height transitions.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Traverse every gantry height transition; call out destination before committing and verify no collision snagging or ambiguous lethal drop reads.

recommendations.risk: Narrow gantry spans can become forced-damage crossfire lanes when encounter density is too high.
recommendations.recommendation: Cap narrow-span pressure and move heavier threats onto wider platforms with lateral choice.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Run gantry encounters at baseline difficulty; verify narrow spans contain no more than one forward pressure source plus one flank/ambient source.

recommendations.risk: Foundry hazards can blend into warm machinery and become readability noise during combat.
recommendations.recommendation: Give each hazard family one distinct tell and preserve safe preview angles before damage exposure.
expected_implementation_touchpoints: Hazard audio or motion cue hooks
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Capture each hazard from first player-visible angle and during combat; verify hot/danger surfaces are distinct from background machinery.

recommendations.risk: Pump interactions may read as disconnected room dressing instead of a connected objective chain.
recommendations.recommendation: Clarify pump objective labels and state-change feedback from intake control through observatory feed.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Complete pump chain in order; after each interaction, identify changed route state and next destination without debug tools.

recommendations.risk: Combat or hazards immediately after pump interaction can interrupt comprehension of the route state change.
recommendations.recommendation: Tune pacing from puzzle read to movement release before adding encounter pressure.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Trigger first pump state change, observe route-open feedback, move through release segment, then enter encounter; verify the changed route is understood before combat starts.

recommendations.risk: A pumpworks secret can feel arbitrary if it is visible before the relevant state change or hidden in pipe clutter.
recommendations.recommendation: Add one observatory-side secret that becomes legible after a pump state change and reconnects before the next required encounter.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: Verify secret is not reachable before the intended pump state, becomes readable after the state change, and returns to the mandatory route before next encounter.

recommendations.risk: Route changes can regress readability, soft-lock safety, and performance when labels, particles, machinery, enemies, and geometry are all visible.
recommendations.recommendation: Add a cross-level route-polish validation pass covering labels, hazard readability, route smoke, screenshots, and heaviest-view performance checks.
recommendations.smoke_validation_coverage: For Level02, Level03, and Level04, capture entrance/midpoint/secret/rejoin evidence and test the busiest combined view for readability and frame stability.
